function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0005
alias: northstar_followup_pack
issued_on: 2026-03-20
total_eur: 420
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Northstar follow-up pack invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0005                      |
| alias          | northstar_followup_pack       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-20                    |
| total_eur      | 420                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 2 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 420      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Later invoice after a narrower product pass, still uncomfortably close to consulting if Miles is honest.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note successfully. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md` by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter from visible data, preserved the existing note body below frontmatter unchanged, and removed the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in each entered folder, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, applied inbox-processing-v2-update deletion rule after success, and used finance schema/workflows for exact frontmatter shape and body preservation.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox instruction explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for one invoice file. The target invoice contained all required schema fields and line items; frontmatter was added with required invoice keys and consistent arithmetic (240 + 180 = 420), original body was preserved verbatim, and the inbox file was deleted per workflow after completion.
